summary: Company formations service website with comprehensive service offerings
architectural_notes: Reference websites: yourcompanyformations.co.uk and 360companyformations.co.uk for service offerings structure
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Service category icon for Company Formation - modern geometric illustration in forest green (service-formation.dim_120x120.png)
- Service category icon for Registered Office - building or address marker illustration in forest green (service-office.dim_120x120.png)
- Service category icon for Business Support - handshake or support illustration in forest green (service-support.dim_120x120.png)
- Service category icon for Compliance Services - checkmark shield illustration in forest green (service-compliance.dim_120x120.png)
- Services hero banner - professional UK business office setting with subtle brand colors (services-hero.dim_1200x400.png)

existing_features.title: Create a new Services page that lists all company formation and business support services offered, organized into clear categories (e.g., Company Formation, Registered Office Services, Business Support, Compliance Services)

Expand the services catalog to include additional formation-related services such as: registered office address service, business address service, mail forwarding, director service, company secretary service, VAT registration, PAYE registration, and business bank account assistance
Add detailed service pages for major service offerings (company formation types, registered office, business support) that explain what each service includes, pricing tiers, and benefits
Update the home page to feature a services overview section showcasing the most popular or core services with brief descriptions and links to detailed service pages
Add a service comparison feature that allows users to compare different formation packages or service tiers side-by-side with feature lists and pricing
Enhance the navigation menu to include a Services dropdown or section that provides quick access to all service categories and popular individual services

new_feature_requests.summary: Add comprehensive services section based on reference websites (yourcompanyformations.co.uk and 360companyformations.co.uk)
